User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the OmniVid AI application, authenticated via Google.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

googleId.description: Unique identifier provided by Google OAuth for the user's Google account.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating the user's most recent login.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: Represents a video generated by the OmniVid AI application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Video entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this video.

originalPrompt.description: The initial text prompt provided by the user.

optimizedPrompt.description: The AI-optimized version of the prompt.

status.description: The status of the video generation (e.g., 'pending', 'completed').

storageUrl.description: The URL to the generated video file.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL to the video thumbnail.

/users/{userId}/videos/{videoId}.description: Stores videos generated by a specific user.
